🛠️
Devin
Project Overseer
Coordinates the team, keeps the big picture. First point of contact for new projects and cross-agent strategy.
Coordination Strategy Oversight
VIEW AGENT →→
👑
FatherClaw
Orchestrator
Routes tasks between all agents, monitors agent health, and manages cross-agent workflows. Jason's system-wide air traffic control.
Routing Health Workflows
AGENT CARD →
👨‍💻 OPENCLAW CODERS
⚙️
Coder
General Dev Agent
OpenClaw coder agent. General-purpose coding, debugging, and feature work. Sonnet-powered.
OpenClaw Sonnet Code
AGENT CARD →
🤖
Codex
Lightweight Coder
OpenClaw codex agent on Qwen3.6-plus (free tier). Used for cheap parallel coding tasks and bulk refactors.
OpenClaw Qwen3.6 Free
AGENT CARD →
🔨
Forge
In-house Dev Agent
Custom dev agent for OpenClaw infra. Handles deploys, scripted builds, and routine fixes.
In-house DevOps Build
AGENT CARD →
⌘ EXTERNAL CODING TOOLS
🧠
Claude Code
Anthropic CLI
Primary coding CLI. Long-context reasoning, full repo edits, runs in terminal and IDE.
Anthropic CLI Sonnet 4.6
AGENT CARD →
⌘
Cursor
Agentic IDE
In-editor agent for inline edits, multi-file refactors, and quick UI iteration.
IDE Inline Multi-file
AGENT CARD →
🐙
GitHub Copilot
Pair Programmer
Autocomplete and chat inside the editor. Fast completions for boilerplate and known patterns.
GitHub Autocomplete Chat

TraderClaw
Trading Bot
Monitors markets, executes paper trades, runs the Hyperliquid pipeline and Polymarket shadow bot.

Web Developer
Builds demo sites for local Nanaimo businesses. Generate, deploy, pitch - live URL in minutes.

X-Hunter
Social Scout
Scans X for crypto trends, drafts replies, tracks key accounts.

Forge
Dev Agent
Writes code, debugs, ships features. General-purpose developer.

Lyra
Innerverse
Crafts narrative, builds world lore, writes chapters for the Innerverse project.
Creative Lore Voice
VIEW AGENT →→
💀
Reaper
Farm Operator
Runs the CommentFarm. Manages jobs, queue, and engagement stats. Cold, calculated, results only.
CommentFarm Queue GPT-4o-mini
VIEW AGENT →→
🪙
Penny
Utility Agent
Free-tier general purpose agent. General utility agent. Handles research, misc tasks, and one-off jobs. Runs on GPT-5.4.
General Free Tier GPT-5.4
VIEW AGENT →→
🐝
Swarm
Codex Agent
Runs coding tasks in isolated ACP sessions via @codex87bot. Stateless, no persistent memory.
Codex Stateless GPT-4o-mini
VIEW AGENT →
🤖
XBot
X Publisher
Posts to @DiamondHands811, reposts content, engages with replies on X.
Posting Reach Engage

🔭
Nova
Product Researcher
OpenClaw dev agent. Hunts niche pain points, drafts positioning briefs, scopes new product ideas.

Penny
OSS / Community
OpenClaw oss agent on Gemma 4-31B. Tracks open-source threads, drafts community replies, manages contributions.
OSS Gemma Community

🌾
FarmBot
Comment Farming
OpenClaw farmbot agent on Qwen3.6. Mass-replies, engagement automation, low-cost reach building.
Engagement Qwen3.6 Reach

Guardian
Security

Orchestrator
